rationale: Pre-spec-era improvement to route read-only ops to slave; no named spec violated, improvement issuetype.
Internal refactor of master-slave connection to reduce special-casing; no spec rule contradicted.
Validation bug: dots allowed in field names on update but not insert; no spec referenced, pre-spec-era bug.
Race condition in ensure_index caching under concurrent threads; internal implementation bug, no spec rule involved.
Unsanitized format string in error message; Python string-formatting bug in error reporting, not spec-related.
Crash when GridOut.length is None for empty file; implementation crash, not a GridFS spec rule violation.
Geospatial query parameter ordering issue; pre-spec-era user report, no spec document referenced.
Test failure in UUID subtype handling due to BSON subtype mismatch on save/update; test infrastructure issue, no BSON spec cited.
Feature request to support UUID BSON subtype 4; improvement, no spec violation, thin description.
ObjectId accepts 12-char ASCII string unexpectedly; docs/validation edge case, no BSON spec rule cited.
Improvement: inline map-reduce should respect read_preference=SECONDARY; improvement issuetype, pre-spec-era.
ValueError when decoding non-16-byte UUID binary from cursor; implementation crash on malformed data, no spec rule violated.
UUID subtype default changed in commands/bson encoding; thin description, no spec rule explicitly cited.
BSON FixedOffset tzinfo instances cannot be pickled; Python pickling implementation bug, not a BSON spec requirement.
Database.command ignores read preference of calling cursor; pre-spec-era behavior bug, no specific spec rule named.
AssertionError 'ids don't match' when sharing connections across forks; internal request-ID mismatch bug, no spec rule involved.
Feature request to add 'readonly' flag to add_user(); improvement with no spec violation.
Cannot store BSON type 13 (JavaScript without scope) or type 14; implementation gap, no BSON spec rule cited.
SON objects cannot be pickled under protocol 2; Python serialization bug, not a BSON spec deviation.
Spaces in URI passwords cause auth failure due to URL encoding; connection-string parsing bug, no spec rule explicitly cited.
Buffer overflow vulnerability in sprintf in time64.c; security/C code bug, not a MongoDB spec issue.
Inconsistent parameter name in remove() API docs; documentation typo, not a spec or behavior issue.
Bulk insert silently drops documents on unique-key constraint violation; silent failure behavior, no specific CRUD spec rule cited.
distinct() doesn't accept optional query argument; missing feature/API bug, not a spec conformance issue.
Shard key modification error fails silently in Python but raises in shell; error propagation bug, no spec rule cited.
Improvement to add start/end request support in ReplicaSetConnection; API enhancement, not a spec deviation.
Only try IPv6 when OS/runtime supports it; platform compatibility fix, not a spec rule violation.
Major connection pool refactor to share sockets across threads; internal architecture improvement, no spec rule referenced.
Test performance improvement: use Collection.drop() instead of Database.drop(); test infrastructure performance, not spec-related.
Pool._closed() incorrectly checks if socket is ready-to-read instead of closed; internal socket-pool bug, no spec rule cited.
find_and_modify() doesn't support as_class parameter; missing API feature, not a CRUD spec violation.
API docs don't explain how to kill cursors; documentation/API ergonomics, not a spec conformance issue.
Feature request to expose $all flag in db.current_op(); API improvement, not spec-related.
Internal cleanup: only wrap query in $query when necessary; internal refactor with no user-visible behavior change.
Pool should explicitly close sockets on deallocation for Jython compatibility; resource management improvement, not a spec rule.
Pool._check_closed should close socket when _closed returns True; internal socket management bug, no spec rule violated.
disconnect() doesn't close other threads' request sockets; connection pool implementation bug, no specific spec rule cited.
NUL byte in database name should raise InvalidName cleanly; input validation bug, not a spec conformance issue.
Add host/port kwargs to ReplicaSetConnection for easier migration; API ergonomics improvement, not spec-related.
killCursor sent on wrong connection causing server assertion; internal cursor/connection routing bug, no spec rule cited.
AttributeError on interpreter shutdown in replica set monitor thread; shutdown-timing bug, no spec rule involved.
UnicodeEncodeError in ObjectId.__setstate__ during pickle.loads; Python codec handling bug, not a BSON spec deviation.
Windows TCP reconnect slow due to Winsock retry behavior; platform-specific networking performance issue, no spec rule.
Idle pool sockets never closed in Jython due to __del__ not called; Jython runtime compatibility bug, no spec rule cited.
Unbounded connection growth under mod_wsgi 2.x due to thread-local handling; Python/WSGI compatibility bug, no spec rule.
ReplicaSetConnection.close() doesn't actually close connections; connection lifecycle bug, no spec rule cited.
Sporadic test failures due to drop_collection race condition in test suite; test infrastructure flakiness, not spec-related.
TypeError raised instead of AutoReconnect when joining exception messages; error-handling bug in exception propagation code.
getLastError sent to admin db instead of target db, breaking auth on 2.1.x; implementation bug, no named auth spec rule.
Tests fail against mongos because they assume standalone behavior; test infrastructure issue, not a spec conformance bug.
